title: Software Developer (Java)
description:
About the Company

Our client is a well-established organization with a strong presence in the transport and infrastructure sector.

Responsibilities

We are looking for an experienced Software Developer (Java) to design, build, and maintain scalable enterprise applications.

  • Develop C++ applications for embedded systems (Linux/Windows);
  • Integrate hardware interfaces (e.g. serial, network, Bluetooth);
  • Build backend services using Java and Spring Boot;
  • Develop REST APIs and manage databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle);
  • Troubleshoot system issues and support deployments;
  • Work with cross-functional teams in Agile setup.

Requirements

  • Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field;
  • At least 3–5 years of experience in embedded or backend development;
  • Proficient in C++, Java, REST APIs, and relational databases;
  • Familiar with Agile methods and tools like JIRA;
  • Strong problem-solving and debugging skills;
  • Clear communication and team player mindset;
  • Able to work independently and handle challenges.

Employment Details

  • This role is located in East Singapore;
  • Hybrid work arrangement;
  • Occasional travel within Singapore required.

Get in touch with us

If you’d like to explore this opportunity, please reach out to Cleon Tan (Regn No. R1547199)at cleon@fcs-careers.com for a confidential discussion.

FCS CAREERS PTE LTD (EA 94C4359)

Data Protection Notice: By submitting any application or resume to us, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to our Data Protection Policy (www.fcs-careers.com/about/data-protection), and that you consent to the collection, use and/or disclosure of your personal data by us for the purposes set out in the Policy. You may withdraw consent or make an access or correction request in respect of your personal data, however, depending on the nature or scope of such request, we may not be able to continue providing services to you. For any request, enquiry, or feedback, please contact our Data Protection Officer (dpo@fcs-careers.com).

postedCompany.description:
Headquartered in Singapore, FCS Careers was established in 1991 with the purpose of bringing talented individuals together – facilitating connections that are creative, meaningful and rewarding.

Collaborating and partnering with organisations ranging from small businesses and startups to multinational corporations, we’re deeply invested in understanding our clients’ business in order to create high-impact solutions that are uniquely tailored to our clients’ priorities and strategies.

Passionate about creating value, we continually strive to improve the business world and work environment by advising on employment regulations and hiring trends, and championing best practices within the industry.


We believe in people first.
We work with exceptional individuals, and we take a highly proactive approach in understanding career aspirations, personality traits and competencies that enable an individual to thrive in each business environment.

We work with integrity and trust.
We strive to build lasting relationships with our clients, and are highly committed to their business priorities. We partner with our clients to provide trusted and reliable feedback and advice that inform their human resource decisions.

We value curiosity, creativity and diversity.
We deeply understand the importance of having different ideas and unique perspectives contribute to shared knowledge. We encourage curiosity and value creativity and diversity in our teams as well as in the people we bring together through our work.


A trusted partner in your career transition.

If you’re seeking a change in environment, or looking to develop your career or hone your skills in an area of interest, we’re here to facilitate your transition and to provide insights on the opportunities available.


FCS Careers Pte Ltd is a Recruitment & Professional Search firm registered in Singapore under Licence No. 94C4359.

www.fcs-careers.com
